attacking_style: Premature attacker who struggles with timing and distance judgment, launching efforts too far from finish on non-categorized terrain from established breakaways rather than waiting for decisive moments.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical pattern from observations available.
terrain_preference: Shows breakaway durability on varied terrain but lacks the acceleration for categorized climbs or punchy finishes where winning moves are made.
vulnerability: Poor breakaway economy and race craft: wastes energy on mistimed attacks with excessive distance remaining, unable to convert positioning into wins when it matters.
key_patterns: Attacks prematurely from breakaways with too much distance to finish (2 observations)
Lacks winning acceleration despite good endurance in long breaks (2 observations)
Burns matches on non-optimal terrain away from categorized climbs (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Shows consistent breakaway presence and durability but unchanged tactical decision-making deficits prevent progression to wins
